meaning: n.意见不同,不调和,争执,不和,争论
examples: The disagreement arose over a different use of terminology.
There is considerable disagreement over the safety of the treatment.
The disagreement over trade tariffs has soured relations between the two countries.
Brown was forced to move out because of a disagreement with the hotel's management.
Prolonged eye contact during a debate or disagreement can signal you're standing your ground.
